response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 13+ years of experience, full-stack TypeScript/Node.js skills, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or cloud-based AI platforms required for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role. Customer-facing technical leadership experience is also not clearly evidenced.
strengths: 13+ years polyglot engineering experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js background
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and running workshops/courses
concerns: No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM optimization
Limited evidence of designing/shipping production AI systems on AWS/GCP/Azure at scale
No clear customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery experience with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work
Strong senior engineering tenure and polyglot skills
